strategies.name: Supplier Diversification
strategies.description: Source from multiple countries/suppliers to reduce concentration risk

strategies.name: Inventory Buffering
strategies.description: Build strategic safety stock to buffer against short-term disruptions

strategies.name: Substitution / Reformulation
strategies.description: Qualify alternative ingredients that can replace the primary commodity

strategies.name: Nearshoring / Reshoring
strategies.description: Shift sourcing to geographically closer or more stable regions

strategies.name: Contract Hedging
strategies.description: Lock in prices and volumes through forward contracts and hedging instruments

strategies.name: Vertical Integration
strategies.description: Acquire or invest in upstream production capacity

strategies.name: Demand Shaping
strategies.description: Adjust product mix or promotions to shift demand away from constrained ingredients

strategies.name: Logistics Diversification
strategies.description: Use multiple shipping routes, carriers, and ports to reduce transit risk

strategies.name: Information Sharing
strategies.description: Establish real-time data sharing with key suppliers for early warning

strategies.name: Flexible Capacity
strategies.description: Maintain flexible manufacturing capacity to adapt to ingredient availability

strategies.name: Compliance Readiness
strategies.description: Proactively prepare for regulatory changes with documentation, audits, and certification
